creator: freebsd@txtfile.eu
text: 'deskutils/paperless' upstream GitHub project was archived in 2021. The drop in replacement (paperless-ngx) of the drop in replacement (paperless-ng) is packaged as 'deskutils/py-paperless-ngx'. I do not see a reason to keep the dead original project. So I kindly request to deprecate and remove 'deskutils/paperless'.
